The man on the phone occasionally glances around, while the others remain still and attentive. Later, a different man in a dark suit and glasses is seated at a table, hands resting on a closed laptop, occasionally shifting his gaze and fidgeting with a small object. The setting is dark and confined, with minimal background details visible.
